Let’s look at Rhat differences

^ Which have DO
DO_status n
Has DO 144
Missing DO 136
^ Count of values that are NA (bad data)
measure DO_status n
DO.obs Missing DO 136
DO.sat Has DO 126
DO.sat Missing DO 49
depth Has DO 58
depth Missing DO 52
discharge Has DO 58
discharge Missing DO 52
discharge.daily Has DO 144
discharge.daily Missing DO 136
temp.water Has DO 1
temp.water Missing DO 9
^ Count of values that ARE NOT NA (good data)
measure DO_status n
DO.obs Has DO 144
DO.sat Has DO 18
DO.sat Missing DO 87
depth Has DO 86
depth Missing DO 84
discharge Has DO 86
discharge Missing DO 84
light Has DO 144
light Missing DO 136
temp.water Has DO 143
temp.water Missing DO 127
^ Count where DO isn’t missing
measure DO_status n
DO.sat Has DO 291
depth Has DO 158
discharge Has DO 158
discharge.daily Has DO 380
temp.water Has DO 1
